channel.title: GarageScape Blog
channel.description: Calgary garage organization, decluttering, and cleaning insights from GarageScape.

item.title: Hire vs. DIY Garage Organization Calgary: 2026 Cost Guide
item.description: Should you hire a professional or tackle your Calgary garage yourself? We break down real 2026 costs, time on the job, and a five-factor decision matrix to help you choose the right approach for your situation.

item.title: Professional Garage Cleaning Tips for Calgary Climate
item.description: Calgary's road salt and freeze-thaw cycles destroy garage floors without proper care. This guide covers seasonal cleaning calendars, salt removal techniques, oil stain treatment with products from Canadian Tire, and when it's time to call a professional.

item.title: Custom Garage Shelving Solutions for Calgary Homes
item.description: Compare built-in, modular, and floating shelving for Calgary garages. Includes load capacities, moisture considerations for Alberta winters, and cost breakdowns from local suppliers including Princess Auto and Home Depot.

item.title: Winter & Spring Garage Organization Tips for Calgary Homeowners
item.description: Get your Calgary garage ready for spring. Sort winter gear, handle tire swaps, protect your floor, and build a seasonal rotation system that holds up all year.

item.title: How to Clean Your Garage Floor in Calgary
item.description: Step-by-step guide to cleaning your Calgary garage floor, including degreaser selection, Alberta TSP regulations, pressure washing timing, and epoxy prep. Includes CAD product prices from local retailers.

item.title: Creative Garage Storage Ideas for Calgary Homes
item.description: Maximize your Calgary garage with overhead ceiling racks, wall-track systems, hockey equipment storage, tire storage solutions, and Costco vs Canadian Tire bin comparisons. Includes a 4-season zone rotation system.

item.title: Complete Garage Organization Guide for Calgary Homeowners
item.description: A step-by-step guide to transforming your cluttered Calgary garage into an organized, functional space. Covers decluttering, storage solutions, and long-term maintenance.

item.title: Epoxy Garage Flooring: Is It Right for Your Calgary Home?
item.description: Learn about epoxy flooring benefits, installation process, and maintenance for Calgary's climate. Discover if it's the right choice for your garage, including costs and contractor recommendations.

item.title: Creating the Perfect Garage Workshop in Calgary
item.description: Transform your garage into a functional workshop. Learn tool storage, workbench setup, safety considerations, and heating options specific to Calgary's climate.
